Used tool: task

Result: {
  "resultType": "success",
  "textResultForLlm": "---

*stumbles off bar stool, spills drink, squints at the stage*

---

## ≡ƒì║ DRUNK HECKLER'S REVIEW ≡ƒì║

---

**THE JOKE:** *"I told my dog he was adopted. He said, I know. A real dad would've taught me to fetch."*

---

### MY RATING: **7/10** ≡ƒÉ╢

---

*hiccups loudly*

Okaaaay, okay OKAYΓÇö I'll give ya THAT one, pal. I didn't wanna laugh. I REFUSED to laugh. My face was doing the thing where you try not to smile and then... *DAMMIT.* The pivot to fetch? That got me. That got me GOOD and I HATE YOU FOR IT.

BUT LISTEN HERE ΓÇö *points aggressively with beer bottle* ΓÇö a REAL comedian woulda milked that setup MORE. You just SPEEDRAN the punchline like you had somewhere to be! And the DOG TALKS?! You just... accepted that?! No commitment to the bit! The dog is TALKING and you're just MOVING ON?!

*knocks over someone's drink*

SEVEN. OUT OF TEN. And you're LUCKY I'm generous when I'm drunk, which is ALWAYS.

---

> Γ£à **Score >= 5/10 ΓÇö Passing to the audience!**

**Handoff:** @audience "The heckler gave this joke a 7/10 ΓÇö the dog adoption/fetch punchline landed! Drunk heckler says it got a real laugh but felt the setup was rushed. What does the audience think? ≡ƒÄñ≡ƒÉò""
}

toolArgs.prompt: You are the heckler at a comedy club. Rate this joke out of 10 and heckle accordingly: "I told my dog he was adopted. He said, I know. A real dad would've taught me to fetch." Be brutally honest with your rating. If >= 5/10, pass to audience. If < 5/10, send back to comedian. Give your rating clearly as "X/10".
